```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# WGBS 分析流程 - Step 3: DMR Calling 与注释
# ==============================================================================
dmr_table_dir_1 <- "result/3_dmr/tables/1"
dmr_table_dir_2 <- "result/3_dmr/tables/2"
dmr_plot_dir <- "result/3_dmr/plots/1"
ensure_step_dirs(dmr_table_dir_1, dmr_table_dir_2, dmr_plot_dir)

# ==============================================================================
# 1 差异甲基化分析 (DML/DMR Calling)
# ==============================================================================
# 这是 stage1 最核心、也最吃时间/内存的部分。
# 先做单 CpG 位点检验，再按设定阈值把相邻显著位点聚合成 DMR。

ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()

if(!exists("sample_ids") || length(sample_ids) == 0) {
  sample_ids <- vapply(obj.cpg, function(x) x@sample.id, character(1))
}

message("⏳ 开始 DSS 差异分析...")
message(
  "   DMR calling 阈值: p.threshold < ", config$dmr_p_threshold,
  ", pct.sig >= ", scales::percent(config$dmr_pct_sig, accuracy = 1),
  ", minlen >= ", config$dmr_minlen, " bp",
  ", minCG >= ", config$dmr_minCG,
  ", delta >= ", config$dmr_delta
)

# 构建 BSseq 对象
# DSS 使用的是 BSseq 格式，这里把 methylKit 的 coverage / methylated count 整理成 DSS 所需输入。
dss_input_list <- lapply(obj.cpg, function(x) {
  df <- getData(x)
  data.frame(chr = df$chr, pos = df$start, N = df$coverage, X = df$numCs)
})
BSobj <- makeBSseqData(dss_input_list, sample_ids)

# DML 检验
# 这一层得到的是单个 CpG 位点的差异统计，后面的 callDMR 会基于这些位点结果做区域聚合。
dmlTest <- DMLtest(BSobj, 
                   group1 = sample_ids[config$group1_idx], 
                   group2 = sample_ids[config$group2_idx], 
                   smoothing = config$dss_smoothing,
                   smoothing.span = config$dss_smoothing_span,
                   ncores = config$dss_ncores)

# 统一方向为 group2 - group1，避免后续 Hyper/Hypo 与四象限解释混乱
dml_df <- as.data.frame(dmlTest)
dml_pval_col <- first_existing_col(dml_df, c("pvals", "pvalue", "pval"))
if(all(c("mu1", "mu2") %in% colnames(dml_df))) {
  dml_df <- dml_df %>%
    mutate(
      meanMethy_group1 = mu1,
      meanMethy_group2 = mu2,
      group1_label = config$group1_name,
      group2_label = config$group2_name,
      diff.Methy = meanMethy_group2 - meanMethy_group1,
      diffMethy = diff.Methy
    )
} else if("diff" %in% colnames(dml_df)) {
  dml_df <- dml_df %>% mutate(
    meanMethy_group1 = NA_real_,
    meanMethy_group2 = NA_real_,
    group1_label = config$group1_name,
    group2_label = config$group2_name,
    diff.Methy = -diff,
    diffMethy = diff.Methy
  )
} else {
  stop("❌ DMLtest 结果中未找到可用于方向统一的甲基化差异列")
}
dml_df <- dml_df %>%
  mutate(
    DML_type = ifelse(diff.Methy > 0, "Hyper", "Hypo"),
    negLog10P = if(!is.na(dml_pval_col)) safe_neglog10(.data[[dml_pval_col]]) else NA_real_
  )

# 全量 DML 位点表很大，不再默认写成 CSV；保留压缩 RDS 供后续追溯。
# 当前显著筛选口径仍沿用 config$dmr_p_threshold；严格解读时建议同步查看 FDR/qvalue。
dml_legacy_csv <- file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dml_results.csv")
dml_legacy_target <- file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dml_results_legacy_full_csv_not_regenerated.csv")
if(file.exists(dml_legacy_csv) && !file.exists(dml_legacy_target)) {
  file.rename(dml_legacy_csv, dml_legacy_target)
}
saveRDS(dml_df, file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dml_results.rds"), compress = "gzip")
if(!is.na(dml_pval_col)) {
  dml_sig_df <- dml_df %>% filter(.data[[dml_pval_col]] < config$dmr_p_threshold)
  write_csv(dml_sig_df, file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dml_results_p_lt_0_05.csv"))
  message("✅ DML 全量 RDS 已保存；pvalue < ", config$dmr_p_threshold, " 位点数: ", nrow(dml_sig_df))
} else {
  message("✅ DML 全量 RDS 已保存；未找到 pvalue 列，跳过显著 DML CSV")
}

# DMR 调用
# 所有 DMR calling 阈值都从顶部 config 读取，便于以后统一改标准而不漏改正文代码。
dmrs <- callDMR(dmlTest, 
                delta = config$dmr_delta,
                p.threshold = config$dmr_p_threshold,
                minlen = config$dmr_minlen,
                minCG = config$dmr_minCG,
                dis.merge = config$dmr_dis_merge,
                pct.sig = config$dmr_pct_sig        
)

# 整理 DMR 结果表
# 这里把 DSS 原始输出整理成 downstream 统一字段，避免后续脚本再做方向和列名判断。
dmrs <- dmrs %>%
  mutate(
    DMR_id = paste0("DMR_", row_number()),
    meanMethy_group1 = meanMethy1,
    meanMethy_group2 = meanMethy2,
    group1_label = config$group1_name,
    group2_label = config$group2_name,
    diff.Methy = meanMethy_group2 - meanMethy_group1,
    diffMethy = diff.Methy,
    DMR_type = ifelse(diff.Methy > 0, "Hyper", "Hypo"), 
    chr = as.character(chr) 
  ) %>%
  arrange(chr, start)

write_csv(dmrs, file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dmr_raw.csv"))
message("✅ 鉴定到 DMR 数量: ", nrow(dmrs))

# DMR calling 阈值敏感性
# DSS 官方文档也强调 DMR 阈值没有唯一自然标准；这里保留主阈值结果不变，
# 额外扫描 delta / pct.sig / minCG，帮助判断核心结论是否依赖单一阈值组合。
make_dmr_gr_for_overlap <- function(dmr_df) {
  if(is.null(dmr_df) || nrow(dmr_df) == 0) return(GRanges())
  GRanges(
    seqnames = as.character(dmr_df$chr),
    ranges = IRanges(start = dmr_df$start, end = dmr_df$end)
  )
}

primary_dmr_gr_for_sensitivity <- make_dmr_gr_for_overlap(dmrs)
dmr_sensitivity_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  delta = config$dmr_sensitivity_delta,
  pct_sig = config$dmr_sensitivity_pct_sig,
  minCG = config$dmr_sensitivity_minCG
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_threshold = config$dmr_p_threshold,
    minlen = config$dmr_minlen,
    dis_merge = config$dmr_dis_merge
  )

dmr_sensitivity_summary <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(dmr_sensitivity_grid)), function(i) {
  params <- dmr_sensitivity_grid[i, ]
  sens_dmrs <- tryCatch(
    callDMR(
      dmlTest,
      delta = params$delta,
      p.threshold = params$p_threshold,
      minlen = params$minlen,
      minCG = params$minCG,
      dis.merge = params$dis_merge,
      pct.sig = params$pct_sig
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      attr(params, "error_message") <- e$message
      NULL
    }
  )

  if(is.null(sens_dmrs)) {
    return(tibble(
      delta = params$delta,
      pct_sig = params$pct_sig,
      minCG = params$minCG,
      p_threshold = params$p_threshold,
      minlen = params$minlen,
      n_dmr = NA_integer_,
      n_hyper = NA_integer_,
      n_hypo = NA_integer_,
      median_length = NA_real_,
      median_abs_diff = NA_real_,
      primary_overlap_fraction = NA_real_,
      sensitivity_overlap_fraction = NA_real_,
      status = "error"
    ))
  }

  sens_df <- as_tibble(sens_dmrs)
  if(nrow(sens_df) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      delta = params$delta,
      pct_sig = params$pct_sig,
      minCG = params$minCG,
      p_threshold = params$p_threshold,
      minlen = params$minlen,
      n_dmr = 0L,
      n_hyper = 0L,
      n_hypo = 0L,
      median_length = NA_real_,
      median_abs_diff = NA_real_,
      primary_overlap_fraction = 0,
      sensitivity_overlap_fraction = 0,
      status = "ok"
    ))
  }

  sens_df <- sens_df %>%
    mutate(
      diff.Methy = meanMethy2 - meanMethy1,
      DMR_type = ifelse(diff.Methy > 0, "Hyper", "Hypo")
    )
  sens_gr <- make_dmr_gr_for_overlap(sens_df)
  ov <- findOverlaps(primary_dmr_gr_for_sensitivity, sens_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)
  primary_hits <- length(unique(queryHits(ov)))
  sensitivity_hits <- length(unique(subjectHits(ov)))

  tibble(
    delta = params$delta,
    pct_sig = params$pct_sig,
    minCG = params$minCG,
    p_threshold = params$p_threshold,
    minlen = params$minlen,
    n_dmr = nrow(sens_df),
    n_hyper = sum(sens_df$DMR_type == "Hyper", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_hypo = sum(sens_df$DMR_type == "Hypo", na.rm = TRUE),
    median_length = median(sens_df$length, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_abs_diff = median(abs(sens_df$diff.Methy), na.rm = TRUE),
    primary_overlap_fraction = if(length(primary_dmr_gr_for_sensitivity) > 0) primary_hits / length(primary_dmr_gr_for_sensitivity) else NA_real_,
    sensitivity_overlap_fraction = if(length(sens_gr) > 0) sensitivity_hits / length(sens_gr) else NA_real_,
    status = "ok"
  )
}))

write_csv(dmr_sensitivity_summary, file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dmr_threshold_sensitivity_summary.csv"))

# dmrseq region-level 交叉验证
# 默认启用以提供 DMR 结果的统计稳健性验证。
# 若需跳过（例如节省运行时间），设置 WGBS_SKIP_DMRSEQ=1
dmrseq_status_file <- file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dmrseq_crosscheck_status.csv")
if(isTRUE(config$run_dmrseq_crosscheck)) {
  if(requireNamespace("dmrseq", quietly = TRUE)) {
    dmrseq_status <- tryCatch({
      BSobj_dmrseq <- BSobj
      bsseq::pData(BSobj_dmrseq)$group <- factor(
        ifelse(sample_ids %in% sample_ids[config$group1_idx], config$group1_name, config$group2_name),
        levels = c(config$group1_name, config$group2_name)
      )
      dmrseq_res <- dmrseq::dmrseq(
        bs = BSobj_dmrseq,
        testCovariate = "group",
        cutoff = config$dmr_delta,
        maxPerms = config$dmrseq_max_permutations
      )
      dmrseq_df <- as_tibble(as.data.frame(dmrseq_res))
      write_csv(dmrseq_df, file.path(dmr_table_dir_1, "dmrseq_crosscheck_regions.csv"))
      tibble(step = "dmrseq", status = "ok", message = paste("regions:", nrow(dmrseq_df)))
    }, error = function(e) {
      tibble(step = "dmrseq", status = "error", message = e$message)
    })
    write_csv(dmrseq_status, dmrseq_status_file)
  } else {
    write_csv(tibble(step = "dmrseq", status = "skipped", message = "dmrseq package is not installed"), dmrseq_status_file)
  }
} else {
  write_csv(tibble(step = "dmrseq", status = "skipped", message = "unset WGBS_SKIP_DMRSEQ or set it to a value other than 1 to enable"), dmrseq_status_file)
}

# DML 位点层图表已移除，只保留结果表供后续追溯与补充分析使用。

```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 2 DMR 注释与基因映射
# ==============================================================================
message("⏳ 开始 DMR 注释...")

# 准备主染色体版 TxDb
# 主染色体版 TxDb 会被后面的 annotatePeak、browser 图和 gene model 反复使用。
txdb <- load_main_chr_txdb(config$gtf_file)
txdb_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", seqlevels(txdb)))

dmr_n_before_main_chr <- nrow(dmrs)
dmrs$chr <- standardize_chr_style(dmrs$chr, target_has_chr = txdb_has_chr)
dmrs <- filter_df_to_main_chr(dmrs, chr_col = "chr")
message("✅ 主染色体 DMR 数量（用于注释与 downstream）: ", nrow(dmrs), " / ", dmr_n_before_main_chr)

# 转换为 GRanges 并执行注释
# 这里把表格型 DMR 转成 GRanges，并按 promoter/exon/intron/intergenic 等层级做标准注释。
dmr_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = dmrs$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = dmrs$start, end = dmrs$end),
  DMR_id = dmrs$DMR_id,
  diffMethy = dmrs$diff.Methy,
  meanMethy_group1 = dmrs$meanMethy_group1,
  meanMethy_group2 = dmrs$meanMethy_group2,
  group1_label = dmrs$group1_label,
  group2_label = dmrs$group2_label,
  DMR_type = dmrs$DMR_type
)
dmr_gr <- filter_gr_to_main_chr(dmr_gr)

# DMR 每样本覆盖支持度
# 这张表用于检查每个 DMR 是否由两组样本都有足够 CpG/coverage 支撑，
# 也方便后续把低覆盖敏感性分析与主 DMR 结果做交叉核对。
dmr_support_status_file <- file.path(dmr_table_dir_2, "dmr_region_support_status.csv")
dmr_region_meth <- tryCatch({
  ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()
  build_region_sample_methylation(
    obj.cpg,
    dmr_gr,
    sample_ids_arg = sample_ids,
    config_arg = config,
    region_ids = mcols(dmr_gr)$DMR_id
  )
}, error = function(e) {
  write_csv(tibble(step = "dmr_region_support", status = "error", message = e$message), dmr_support_status_file)
  NULL
})

if(!is.null(dmr_region_meth)) {
  write_csv(dmr_region_meth$support, file.path(dmr_table_dir_2, "dmr_region_sample_support.csv"))
  dmr_support_summary <- dmr_region_meth$support %>%
    group_by(RegionID) %>%
    summarise(
      n_samples_supported = sum(Coverage > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_groups_supported = n_distinct(Group[Coverage > 0]),
      min_sample_coverage = min(Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_sample_coverage = max(Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
      min_sample_cpg_sites = min(n_cpg_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_sample_cpg_sites = max(n_cpg_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rename(DMR_id = RegionID)
  write_csv(dmr_support_summary, file.path(dmr_table_dir_2, "dmr_region_support_summary.csv"))
  write_csv(tibble(step = "dmr_region_support", status = "ok", message = paste(nrow(dmr_support_summary), "DMRs summarized")), dmr_support_status_file)
}

# 使用 org.Mm.eg.db 添加 Gene Symbol
peak_anno <- annotatePeak(dmr_gr, TxDb = txdb, tssRegion = c(-config$promoter_upstream, config$promoter_downstream),
                          genomicAnnotationPriority = c("Promoter", "5UTR", "3UTR", "Exon", "Intron","Downstream", "Intergenic"), 
                          annoDb = "org.Mm.eg.db", 
                          level = "transcript", verbose = FALSE)

# 结果清洗与保存
# geneId 在这里先去掉版本号，后面和 RNA-seq / KEGG / GO 连接时会更稳。
dmr_anno_df <- as.data.frame(peak_anno)
if(!("DMR_id" %in% colnames(dmr_anno_df))) {
  dmr_anno_df$DMR_id <- dmrs$DMR_id
}

# 清洗 Gene ID (去除版本号)
if("geneId" %in% colnames(dmr_anno_df)) {
  dmr_anno_df$gene_id_clean <- str_replace(dmr_anno_df$geneId, "\\..*$", "")
}
dmr_anno_df$annotation_simple <- normalize_feature_label(dmr_anno_df$annotation)

write_csv(dmr_anno_df, file.path(dmr_table_dir_2, "dmr_annotated.csv"))

```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 3 DML 火山图与 DMR 长度-效应关系图
# ==============================================================================
# 补充关键可视化：DML 火山图是论文标准展示；DMR 长度 vs 甲基化差异帮助判断效应尺度。
message("⏳ 绘制 DML 火山图与 DMR 长度-效应关系图...")

# DML 火山图
if(exists("dml_df") && nrow(dml_df) > 0 && !is.na(dml_pval_col)) {
  dml_volcano_df <- dml_df %>%
    mutate(
      sig_type = case_when(
        .data[[dml_pval_col]] < config$dmr_p_threshold & diff.Methy > config$dmr_delta ~ "Hyper",
        .data[[dml_pval_col]] < config$dmr_p_threshold & diff.Methy < -config$dmr_delta ~ "Hypo",
        .data[[dml_pval_col]] < config$dmr_p_threshold ~ "Sig (small Δ)",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(diff.Methy), is.finite(.data[[dml_pval_col]]), .data[[dml_pval_col]] > 0)

  # 采样以提高绘图效率 (太多点时)
  if(nrow(dml_volcano_df) > 500000) {
    set.seed(42)
    dml_volcano_df <- dml_volcano_df %>%
      group_by(sig_type) %>%
      group_modify(function(.x, .y) {
        max_n <- if(identical(as.character(.y$sig_type[[1]]), "NS")) 200000L else 300000L
        dplyr::slice_sample(.x, n = min(nrow(.x), max_n))
      }) %>%
      ungroup()
  }

  p_dml_volcano <- ggplot(dml_volcano_df, aes(x = diff.Methy, y = -log10(.data[[dml_pval_col]]), color = sig_type)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = viz_style$point_sm) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Hyper" = unname(viz_pal$dmr["Hyper"]),
      "Hypo" = unname(viz_pal$dmr["Hypo"]),
      "Sig (small Δ)" = unname(viz_pal$accent["purple"]),
      "NS" = viz_pal$neutral_mid
    )) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = alpha(viz_pal$neutral_dark, 0.7)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-config$dmr_delta, config$dmr_delta), linetype = "dashed", color = alpha(viz_pal$neutral_dark, 0.7)) +
    labs(
      title = "DML Volcano Plot",
      x = group_diff_axis_label,
      y = "-log10(p-value)",
      color = ""
    ) +
    theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 13)

  ggsave(file.path(dmr_plot_dir, "dml_volcano.pdf"), p_dml_volcano, width = 8, height = 6, device = cairo_pdf)
}

# DMR 长度 vs 甲基化差异绝对值
if(exists("dmr_anno_df") && nrow(dmr_anno_df) > 0) {
  dmr_len_df <- dmr_anno_df %>%
    filter(is.finite(diffMethy)) %>%
    mutate(
      dmr_length = end - start + 1,
      abs_diff = abs(diffMethy)
    )

  p_dmr_length_effect <- ggplot(dmr_len_df, aes(x = dmr_length, y = abs_diff, color = DMR_type)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.55, size = viz_style$point_md) +
    scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
    scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$dmr) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    labs(
      title = "DMR Length vs Effect Size",
      x = "DMR Length (bp, log10)",
      y = "|ΔMeth|",
      color = ""
    ) +
    theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 13)

  ggsave(file.path(dmr_plot_dir, "dmr_length_vs_effect.pdf"), p_dmr_length_effect, width = 8, height = 6, device = cairo_pdf)

  # DMR 长度分布直方图
  p_dmr_length_hist <- ggplot(dmr_len_df, aes(x = dmr_length, fill = DMR_type)) +
    geom_histogram(alpha = 0.65, position = "identity", bins = 50) +
    scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = viz_pal$dmr) +
    labs(title = "DMR Length Distribution", x = "DMR Length (bp, log10)", y = "Count", fill = "") +
    theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 13)

  ggsave(file.path(dmr_plot_dir, "dmr_length_distribution.pdf"), p_dmr_length_hist, width = 8, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```
